title: Transportation & Carrier Procurement Command
guardrails: Packets are review-only: RFQs, tariff versions, booking snapshots, procurement plans, shipments, invoices, and carriers are never mutated silently.
Queue review and approve actions log audit events and may enqueue AssistantActionQueueItem rows — they do not award carriers, confirm bookings, settle invoices, or send communications.

steps: Sign in as a user with org.rfq or org.tariffs edit access.
Click Create Sprint 16 packet and confirm a new AssistantTransportCarrierProcurementPacket row appears with procurementScore and dimensional JSON blobs populated.
scenarios.passWhen: POST create_packet returns 201 and GET lists the packet without altering RFQs, tariffs, snapshots, shipments, or invoices.

steps: Create a packet, then click Queue review with an optional note.
Verify AssistantActionQueueItem references assistant_transport_carrier_procurement_packet and links back to /assistant/transport-carrier-procurement.
scenarios.passWhen: Packet status becomes REVIEW_QUEUED and audit event answerKind sprint16_transport_rev is recorded.

steps: Open an existing packet and click Approve packet after transport finance sign-off.
Confirm audit trail references sprint16_transport_ok and narrative explicitly denies automatic carrier or settlement changes.
scenarios.passWhen: Packet status becomes APPROVED; carriers, bookings, tariffs, invoices, and procurement plans remain unchanged in source tables.
